meta.intent: Teach revealed future value and adjacency literacy by putting the urgent rescue lane behind ice instead of behind a simple crate wall.
meta.expectedPath: Use the lower B and D pairs to crack the frozen ring around the puppy, then clear the revealed lane instead of spending early actions on the cleaner top A or right C sets.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player cashes the easy side sets first, leaves the frozen route untouched too long, and runs out of time opening the real lane.
meta.whatItProves: Ice reads immediately and does not muddle the seed.
meta.notes: The puppy is surrounded by four ice tiles so the player cannot safely ignore the reveal step; the side pairs are present as bait, not as the intended route.
